heading: Prerequisites
body:
- The [Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current) installed and running v1.14.3 or
  later.

- [MongoDB Command Line Database Tools](https://fastdl.mongodb.org/tools/db/mongodb-database-tools-macos-arm64-100.10.0.zip)
  installed.

- A terminal and code editor to run your .NET project.

- [.NET version 8.0 or higher](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download)
  installed.

- [Ollama](https://ollama.com/) installed.
